details.heading: Your transaction is secure
details.content: We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

about_item: SECURE AND COZY DEN: The Petmate Two-Door portable dog crate provides easy access with top or front-loading doors, offering a safe and comfortable space for your pet's natural denning instincts
AIRLINE-APPROVED: This small dog carrier airline approved meets most airline cargo specs. Ventilation holes provide fresh air and 360-degree visibility for your pet
IDEAL FOR SMALL PETS: Designed as a puppy carrier for small dogs 0-15 lbs, the 24-inch crate offers room for pets to stand, turn, and lie comfortably; with space for a cushion to enhance comfort
EASY ASSEMBLY AND MAINTENANCE: The plastic dog crate shell is simple to clean; a stay-dry moat directs fluids away from pets
CONVENIENT: Featuring steel doors with easy-squeeze latches and a foldable handle, this USA-made pet carrier for dogs & cats provides a less stressful travel experience

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be well-built and spacious, with plenty of room to move around. The carrier is easy to assemble and disassemble for cleaning, and customers particularly appreciate the top access door. They consider it excellent value for money and suitable for both cats and small dogs, with one customer noting that the second door on top is worth the extra cost.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: Excellent kennel! Very sturdy plastic, 4-6 extra screws and fasteners provided, top loading feature is great, perfect size for my kitten to grow into...
What a great carrier. My little cat was simple to drop in and she was so happy. Love the top opening. Will not work well for a fat cat. Great value.
...Room for growth and my older cat who is 13 pd fits in it good also. Well made, attractive and so so much easier to load them from the top than the...
Great product, just takes forever to assemble. I had to unscrew several screws in order to get the last two in and secure. It took forever....

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier spacious, with plenty of room to move around, making it suitable for both cats and small dogs.

I had to send it back because it was too small, but the color looks fantastic. Very bright and vivid. Sturdy Petmate product of course, well made....
The kennel is a great size, color was as shown but there is no handle and no water cup as amazon states, also the top loading latch was a bit cracked...

authors_reviews.title: Still Love it!!!
authors_reviews.text: I bought this crate because I have a large Himalayan cat that weighs about 17 lbs. We had a slightly smaller crate with the plastic door and he is strong enough he pushed the door so hard it flexed and he got out. The handle also broke when we tried to pick him up. We put him in this one and he didn't even get excited, I believe because he had more than enough room. My other cats also like it.The top opening is great or loading because you can drop them right in, instead of having to try and push them in butt first. It is larger than any I have owned before, but it is worth it so the cats can sit up inside instead of having to lay down.It is easy to put together, btw the top wires of the door do not go into the holes, they fit into the 2 points you see at the top corners of the door. I wondered if I too got the wrong size door but it fits perfectly. The instructions could tell you that, they are just line drawings with few details. the side go together with metal bolts and heavy duty plastic nuts. They work well and it seems very sturdy and held my big cat to his satisfaction.It is definitely worth it, especially for my larger cats and especially at the 44% off price.Update: Sadly my Himalayan passed 4 years ago so that give you an idea how long I have owned mine. I just want to say that I still love them, I bought a 2nd one and have them now for a few years and they are still in great shape. I see a couple of people saying their cats noses were scratched, it is a firm plastic, but have never had a kitty injure themselves and it only takes a few seconds to make sure they haven't sustained any damage or have anything that a cat can scratch themselves on, a quick filing can take down any rough spots if you find some, again I have not had that problem. I only use them to take my cats to the vet, but have a few cats so they do get used. I love the 24", it is big enough that even my very large cats can turn around in them. I have had many other people at the vet's office ask about them and where to find one. The top load is the only way to go, much better than trying to force them into the end door where they can stretch out far to make it hard to put them in. They are great crates.Update: 8 years later and both still look like new and they have transported a lot of cats to the vet and back. Best carriers I have ever owned.
authors_reviews.author: tlt

authors_reviews.title: Versatile N Thoughtfully Designed Pet Carrier for the Comfort and Convenience of Your Furry Friend.
authors_reviews.text: As a pet owner, finding the right carrier that prioritizes both functionality and the well-being of my pet is crucial. The Petmate Two-Door Small Dog Kennel & Cat Kennel has certainly stood out in meeting these criteria.Dual Entry Options: One of the standout features is the flexibility of dual entry points. Whether utilizing the top-loading option for a stress-free placement or the front-loading entrance for easy access during travel, this kennel ensures convenience for both pet and owner.Ideal Size: With a length of 24 inches, this kennel is perfect for small dogs and cats up to 15 pounds. The size strikes a balance between providing ample space for the pet's comfort and remaining easily manageable for the owner.Sturdy and Environmentally Friendly: The fact that this kennel is made with recycled materials is a commendable aspect. It not only contributes to sustainability but also showcases the manufacturer's commitment to responsible production. The sturdy construction ensures the safety and security of the pet during travel.Ventilation and Visibility: The well-ventilated design promotes air circulation, maintaining a comfortable environment for the pet. Additionally, the kennel provides adequate visibility, reducing anxiety for pets who may feel more at ease when aware of their surroundings.Made in the USA: The 'Made in USA' label is another positive aspect, assuring pet owners of quality craftsmanship and adherence to rigorous standards.Smooth Cleaning: The kennel's design facilitates easy cleaning, an essential feature for pet owners. The smooth surfaces and well-thought-out construction make it hassle-free to maintain cleanliness and hygiene for the pet.In conclusion, the Petmate Two-Door Small Dog Kennel & Cat Kennel has proven to be a reliable and well-designed carrier for my small pet. Its thoughtful features, durability, and commitment to sustainability make it a standout choice among pet carriers. If you're seeking a versatile and pet-friendly travel solution, this kennel is certainly worth considering.
authors_reviews.author: David

other_countries_reviews.title: Resiste e prática
other_countries_reviews.text: Ótima caixa. O plástico é de qualidade, espaçosa e resistente. Fácil de montar e prática para colocar/tirar o pet.
other_countries_reviews.author: vanderlei Martins

other_countries_reviews.title: Une bonne taille mais une poignée de transport manquante
other_countries_reviews.text: Une boîte de bonne taille mais la qualité pourrait être meilleure pour le prix. Arrivé sans manette de carrure, si mauvais contrôle de qualité, aucune excuse pour cela. Amazon n'a pas pu obtenir une poignée de remplacement, donc j'ai proposé une solution alternative que j'ai acceptée.J'aurais été 4 ou peut-être 5 étoiles, perdu en raison d'un contrôle de mauvaise qualité et la boîte elle-même juste pour le prix.D'accord, j'espère que ces problèmes ne se produisent pas souvent.
other_countries_reviews.author: Cjohn

other_countries_reviews.title: 高さがあるタイプで低価格
other_countries_reviews.text: 5キロの柴犬で二回使いました。大きさは充分あるし上側から入れられるところが便利でした。中で一度お漏らししましたが 周りに溝がある為 濡れませんでした。
other_countries_reviews.author: ニッシー

other_countries_reviews.title: Big, sturdy, relatively easy to assemble, opens smoothly and seems like it'd be easy to clean
other_countries_reviews.text: I wanted a large, hard sided crate-style carrier to take my cats together to their vet appointments (they're litter mates so they go for their routine appointments at the same time) that they would feel more secure in than a soft sided carrier. This fit the bill nicely! I haven't taken them to the vet in it yet (their next appointment is later this week) but I've practiced putting them in the carrier and carrying them around my apartment in it and they don't seem to get as stressed out or make as many desperate efforts to get out as they have done with their soft-sided carrier. I have high hopes that future trips to the vet, though they won't be stress free, they could be a little less rough on them. The carrier was not too hard to assemble (other than that one of the holes was not neatly drilled to the right size, but I was able to force it through by hammering it in). It's sturdy and the doors are both secure and open and close smoothly. I haven't had to clean it out yet, but it seems like it would be easy to clean up any messes inside thanks to the top-opening door. Happy with this purchase so far.
other_countries_reviews.author: OneLessSN

other_countries_reviews.title: guter, stabiler Kennel
other_countries_reviews.text: sehr gute Verarbeitung wie von Petmate gewohnt, die Lösung mit der Tür auf der Oberseite ist sehr gut verwirklicht, sehr stabil und sehr einfach zu bedienen, bei anderen Kennels mit solch einer Tür lassen sich die Verschlussclips oft nur schwer bedienen und sobald das transportierte Tier etwas schwerer ist biegt sich alles auseinander, ist hier nicht der Fall. Auch die Fronttür ist sehr leicht bedienbar, da klemmt nix. Der Kennel ist voll verschraubt, was ihn sehr stabil macht, aber leider auch ein Auseinandernehmen beim Tierarzt unmöglich. Trotz der stabilen Bauweise ist der Kennel leicht, hält aber trotzdem was aus. Kleine Minuspunkte sind, dass die Tür oben größer sein könnte und insgesamt Platz im Innenraum verschenkt wurde durch die etwas merkwürdige Form und die Aufsatzflächen der 2 Hälften, die verschraubt werden. Ich wollte den Kennel eigentlich für 2 Katzen, dafür ist er aber eigentlich zu klein, die angegebenen Maße täuschen da.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Kunde
